Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Katanya Kamu Suka Modus, Affah Iya?
programme.desc: Farel's car was seized, causing him to have to go everywhere by motorcycle. On the road, Farel met Alin who was in a hurry and suddenly jumped onto his motorcycle, but Farel's motorcycle broke down. Alin and Farel met again at campus because Farel was accused of spying in the women's restroom. Farel holds a grudge against Alin and often plays pranks on her. Will they fall in love?

programme.title: Mendang Mending Tar Bilek Lagi
programme.desc: A couple named Sam and Alea who once dated during high school ended up breaking up. Recently, they have become close again because they both feel incompatible with their current partners. So what is the story of their reunion?

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Backtrace
programme.desc: A thief suffers from amnesia after committing a bank heist and is imprisoned. Seven years later, he is injected with a drug that restores his memory so that he may recover the stolen money.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: Security expert Ray Breslin forms a team of skilled personnel after escaping 'The Tomb'. However, when one of his colleagues goes missing, Breslin is forced to revisit the group that imprisoned him.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: A soldier and his brother escape into the woods when their city is invaded by North Korean paratroopers. After their father is killed, the brothers form a guerrilla group to fight back.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.

programme.title: Gun
programme.desc: Gemini said Angel and Rich trade firearms after Angel's release from jail. However, chaos erupts when they storm a lounge and slay a munitions merchant.

programme.title: The November Man
programme.desc: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt fights against a rogue terrorist and rushes to prevent a deadly virus from spreading. To avert a global catastrophe, Ethan has to bring everything to an end.

programme.title: Force of Execution
programme.desc: A gangster, who seeks to retire from the life of crime, faces a threat when an upcoming rival challenges his authority. He then decides to take help from a trustworthy former apprentice.

programme.title: Superfast!
programme.desc: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

programme.title: Shoulder Arms
programme.desc: Charlie joins a boot camp to become a national hero and gets posted to the front lines in France. He captures 13 Germans and rescues a French girl but later realises that it was just a dream.

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

programme.title: Absolute Deception
programme.desc: Rebecca Scott, a widowed reporter, teams up with an FBI agent to uncover the mystery of her husband's death. However, things take a turn when they are targeted by unknown enemies.

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Jane, an American girl travelling in Hong Kong, gets into a physical altercation with three robbers where she defends herself. A martial artist, who observes the event, trains her for a competition.

programme.desc: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man

programme.desc: As a nefarious force imperils Earth, an unlikely alliance forms between Optimus Prime's Autobots and the mighty Maximals, aided by two humans to safeguard mankind's future.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul, the young scion of House Atreides faces troubling visions of the future. Meanwhile, his family fights to gain control over Arrakis, the only source of the valuable spice melange.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Upon getting adopted by the Littles, Stuart, a mouse, is unwelcomed by his new brother George. So, when Stuart begins to feel low the family helps him find his real parents.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.
